ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Farangis Ostowari and Attorney Seth E. Watkins to appear on Jan-25-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
